calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Everett A. Hewlett, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christine Marcelli, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Cheri Gorman, litigation specialist for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Gladys M. Torres.
Default was entered against defendant on September 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 22, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant Gladys M. Torres as follows:

Damages/Principal - $33,442.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,373.02.
Attorney Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $423.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $36,238.17.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Continued To Jan-24-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-25-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
